<!-- Generated by /laravel-init -->
# /laravel-lint

Run all code quality checks. Must pass clean before `/laravel-test`.

## Steps

Run in this order and report results after each:

### 1. Pint (Formatting)
```bash
vendor/bin/pint --dirty
```
- If changes were made: show which files were formatted
- Re-run to confirm clean: `vendor/bin/pint --dirty --test`

### 2. PHPStan (Static Analysis)
```bash
vendor/bin/phpstan analyse --memory-limit=512M
```
- Must pass at level 9 with zero errors
- If errors: list each error with file:line, fix them, re-run

### 3. Rector (Automated Refactoring)
```bash
vendor/bin/rector --dry-run
```
- If changes suggested: review them, then run `vendor/bin/rector` to apply
- Re-run dry-run to confirm clean

## Pass Criteria

All three must exit with 0 errors. Report:
- Pint: X files formatted / already clean
- PHPStan: X errors / clean
- Rector: X changes suggested / clean

If anything fails, fix and re-run before proceeding to `/laravel-test`.
